narration.text:
Welcome to WorkBlock PM. As a Coordinator, this dashboard is your command center for keeping the build-out pipeline moving. Let's walk through what you'll use every day.

The heart of your day is the Coordinator Queue. You've got 9 items pending here, each one a task that needs you to triage, assign a reviewer, or unblock a teammate. Right next to it, your Active Task shows what you're personally driving right now, so context-switching stays cheap. My Backlog is where you'll plan ahead, the work that's queued up just for you.

When you need to balance load across the team, open the Team Board to see capacity at a glance and reassign with confidence. And when something needs your attention, Notifications surface mentions, escalations, and reviewer pings the moment they happen. That's your dashboard, ready when you are.
